text.title: feedback Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for feedback as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Recipients learn to ignore the positive frames and wait for the real feedback, while the positive content becomes meaningless through association. Use direct, respectful SBI instead.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Adjectives describe personality, not behavior. The recipient cannot change who they are; they can change what they do.
